review_title: One of the Best tool for Customer Management
author: Kishore K.
pros: Easy to access, Multiple Logins can be created. The best part is that you can check on the real time visitors on your webpage and you can start initiate the chat so that you do not miss on any customers. It helps to convert more number of leads in the given scenario
cons: Cost of the product is bit high and charging platform fee is also high

review_title: The best video chat and co-browsing
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Tagove makes everything so easy -- it's easy to set up, it's easy to use, and it's an amazingly powerful tool.
cons: Nothing. The support is excellent, the software is sound and bug-free, and it's a great value for the price.

description: Love this tool! that really allows Smooth video chat on the browser. Very simple to use and no installations required. Will be a perfect tool for customer service, along with their other features like co browsing. suggest everyone to try it out.
author: Gunjan G.

description: Tagove is the trouble-free platform to install and working very well. Most of the time, I am using co-browsing, live chat, and voice calls. Actually, the best thing of Tagove is it includes and video and voice call... Its two-way video chat is predictable form where the customer and support agent can both see and hear each other. It offers outstanding co-browsing features to help out representative’s support customers.
author: Mayur B.
pros: Tagove supports instant chat. I haven’t found any trouble in the installation and the support was also great. I really recommend this extension to all.
cons: One missing feature of this is mobile apps. Nowadays mobile ready chat is a must, as we had talked with; they are coming up with this as well. And in 14 days free trial of their services, they only offer the basic package that just allows for live video chat, voice calls and text chat with co-browsing. Any other highly developed features Tagove has would only be made accessible with the paid Premium package.

description: Tagove is the ultimate platform for businesses to provide live video chat, voice call software with Screen sharing and co browsing. It is very easy to use and I think you might want to take training to use this soft because it’s very user friendly software to use.
author: Sophia H.
pros: The best features I have seen in this software are about video conferencing. It has an instant connection feature with high quality and you can record them without any other software installation.
cons: I am using this software from last 6 months, but I have not faced any problem to use that. I know everything is not perfect in the world so please do availability in a mobile app.

description: Thanks to Tagove who made my business customer relation good. I can provide my customers better service by using Live Chat Software. I am loving its Live Video Chat, Voice call, Text chat with Screen sharing and co-browsing solution within my website. Definitely recommend to all.

Then we move forward and checked Tagove, which is quite amazing as they offer multi-channel support - video chat, call recording, viop, co-browsing and video conferencing, Now we dont need any other software. Thanks Tagove for availing great product.
